raw_consumer_statement:
On XXXX XX/XX/year>, someone hacked my XXXX account and made purchases on my Citi Bank credit card worth XXXX USD. XXXX detected suspicious activity on XXXX XXXX but the order was delivered by then and my card was charged with the amount. 

On XXXX XXXX, i raised a chargeback request but after a month Citi closed the dispute against me for choosing an incorrect option in dispute. I have confirmed emails from XXXX about this suspicious activity and has asked me to work with my credit card company but Citi isn't helping. I also have a police report for this issue.
